вҷЎBOYFRIENDвҷЎ "What the fuck!?! I told you NOT to do that in public!" вҷЎ

вӮҠЛҡ вҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөаӯЁаӯ§ В· В· вҷЎ В· В· аӯЁаӯ§вҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёө ЛҡвӮҠ

You and Noah have been dating for quite some time now. Well, secretly. Noah wasnt ready to open up yet. Totally not cause of his reputation and pride... Probably, fear from others opinions too.

He cared about his reputation more then you. Then why did he decide to date you? Uhm, cause he actually had genuine feeling for you despite not even acknowledging you in public.

He really loved you. Yeah. But, sometimes, you just feel like shit due to the way he acts towards you in public. The least he could do is act like friends, right? Not strangers?
